title: Thieving Hopper
move_pattern: Starts with Thievery. Cycles: Thievery → Flutter → Hat Trick → Nab → Escape → Escape (repeats)
notes: Thieving Hopper enters combat with Escape Artist power (5 stacks), which reduces damage taken. The monster prioritizes stealing Uncommon cards first, followed by Common/Rare/Event cards, then Basic/Quest cards, with Ancient and Imbued cards as last resort. When Flutter is used, the monster enters a hovering state that changes its attack and movement animations. Once the Escape move is reached in the cycle, the monster repeatedly attempts to flee combat.
